title: eleocharis occulta
intro: Eleocharis occulta is a species of sedge, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful for treating wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Eleocharis occulta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve respiratory problems. Eleocharis occulta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its medicinal benefits.
